DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_COMMISSION_PAYMENT_TYPE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_COMMISSION_PAYMENT_TYPE]
( 
	[CommissionPaymentTypeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CommissionPaymentType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,

	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH

	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
